name: Medinah Minerals, Inc.
summary: Medinah Minerals, Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Chile. It principally holds interest in the Altos de Lipangue claims covering an area of approximately 10,500 hectares located in Chile. The company was formerly known as Medinah Mining, Inc. and changed its name to Medinah Minerals, Inc. in 2008. Medinah Minerals, Inc. was founded in 1989 and is based in Indianapolis, Indiana.
